classification.description: The primary incident type based on the Contoso classification taxonomy

severity.description: Current or potential business impact level

urgency.description: How quickly the incident must be addressed

business_impact.description: One sentence describing who and what is affected in business terms

escalation_path.description: The team or role who should own this incident, from the playbook escalation paths

missing_information.description: Comma-separated list of specific missing details, or null if the report is complete

recommended_action.description: One specific, concrete, immediately executable action for the responder

management_summary.description: 2-3 sentences in plain non-technical language: what is happening, who is affected, what is being done
